## Summary

- What does this PR change?
- Why is the change needed?

## Scope

- [ ] Add-on runtime
- [ ] Ingress UI
- [ ] Templates / Telegram messages
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / release pipeline

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] `python -m compileall rootfs/app tests`
- [ ] Relevant YAML / workflow files validated
- [ ] If UI changed, ingress UI checked manually
- [ ] If runtime logic changed, relevant real or simulated scenario was tested

## Behavior notes

- Does this change affect Telegram message format?
- Does it affect power detection logic?
- Does it depend on `ha-dtek-monitor` changes?

## Screenshots / logs / examples

Add screenshots, log excerpts, rendered messages, or config snippets if they help review.
